function.name: _aiagent_update
function.description: Update AI agent module (designer agent configuration).

aiAgentSetting.description: AI agent settings, including model configuration, plugin list, etc.

aiModelKey.description: AI model key, obtained by calling `_company_get_ai_model_list` and using the key field from the returned list

agentTemperature.description: Randomness Temperature, higher value makes responses more random

agentThreadTurns.description: Number of conversation turns to carry

pluginList.description: Plugin list, cannot be empty, must contain at least one plugin. Only the following plugins are available (by key): _query_app_define(Query app config), _query_app_user_list(Query app members), _read_office_file(Read Office files), _read_informat_expression_doc(Read expression doc), _bpmn_process_define_list(Query process define list), _bpmn_get_process_define(Get process define config), _bpmn_create_instance(Create workflow instance), _bpmn_query_instance_list(Query workflow instances), _bpmn_query_instance_info(Query instance details), _bpmn_query_task_list(Query workflow tasks), _bpmn_query_task_info(Query task details), _bpmn_complete_task(Complete workflow task), _get_current_time(Get current time), _get_current_user(Get current user), _web_content(Web content), _javascript_eval(JavaScript eval), _render_html(Render HTML), _send_system_email(Send email), _send_notification(Send notification), _query_all_table_list(Query table list), _query_table_define(Query table define), _query_table_record_list(Query table records), _query_table_record_list_count(Count table records), _table_record_batch_insert(Batch insert records), _table_record_batch_update(Batch update records), _table_record_batch_delete(Batch delete records), _query_all_textindex_list(Query textindex modules), _textindex_search(Textindex search), _knowledgebase_search(Knowledge base search)

id.description: Plugin ID, must equal the value of the key field
